allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('settings',{}\).get\('color',{}\).get\('palette',[]\), indent=2\)\); print\('---'\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('settings',{}\).get\('typography',{}\).get\('fontFamilies',[]\), indent=2\)\); print\('---'\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('settings',{}\).get\('typography',{}\).get\('fontSizes',[]\), indent=2\)\)")
